rationale: Acting on Review 1 fixes the documented defeq coercion in antipode_comp plus the induction+simp hiding in map_id/map_comp (both explicitly in the diff) and the undocumented simp chain ending comul_includeRight; these are real proof-quality issues that improve explicitness. Review 2 only overlaps on the change (valid but minor) and proposes a narrower simpa-to-simp-only tweak whose payoff is smaller. The resulting PR after Review 1 is strictly better.
